Table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

Card of table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

WITH RankedProduct AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION_EN AS COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_DEFAULTLANGUAGE_CODE AS DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_CODE,

EVENTS_DEFAULTLANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION_EN AS DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_CURRENCIES_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE,

EVENTS_CURRENCIES_DESCRIPTION_EN AS CURRENCY_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ACTUALCONTENTUNITS AS PRODUCT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_APPROVALSTATUSCODE AS PRODUCT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_BRAND_BRANDCODE AS PRODUCT_BRAND_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_BRAND_BRANDDESCRIPTIONS_EN AS PRODUCT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_BRAND_BRANDFAMILYNAME AS PRODUCT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_BRAND_EXTERNALBRANDCODE AS PRODUCT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_COLOR_CODE AS PRODUCT_COLOR_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_COLOR_COLORGROUPDATA_CODE AS PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_COLOR_COLORGROUPDATA_HEXCODE AS PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_COLOR_COLORGROUPDATA_NAME_EN AS PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_COLOR_DESCRIPTION_EN AS PRODUCT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_COLOR_HEXCODE AS PRODUCT_COLOR_HEX_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_COMINGSOON AS PRODUCT_COMING_SOON_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_DEFAULTCATEGORY_CODE AS PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_DEFAULTCATEGORY_DESCRIPTION_EN AS PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_DEFAULTCATEGORY_EXTERNALCODE AS PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_DESCRIPTION_EN AS PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_DEVICEVERSION AS PRODUCT_DEVICE_VERSION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_EAN AS PRODUCT_EAN,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_EDITION_EN AS PRODUCT_EDITION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FLAVOUR_EN AS PRODUCT_FLAVOUR,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ISPRODUCTSHIPPABLE AS PRODUCT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ISREDEMPTIONELIGIBLE AS PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ISREVIEWABLE AS PRODUCT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ISREWARDELIGIBLE AS PRODUCT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ISSOLDINDIVIDUALLY AS PRODUCT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ISVISIBLEONLYAFTERHAV AS PRODUCT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_MAXORDERQUANTITY AS PRODUCT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_MINORDERQUANTITY AS PRODUCT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_MODEL AS PRODUCT_MODEL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_NAME_EN AS PRODUCT_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_NICOTINELEVEL_EN AS PRODUCT_NICOTINE_LEVEL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_NUMBERCONTENTUNITS AS PRODUCT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_OFFLINEDATE AS PRODUCT_OFFLINE_DATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_ONLINEDATE AS PRODUCT_ONLINE_DATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PLATFORM AS PRODUCT_PLATFORM,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PMIPRODUCTCATEGORY AS PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PMIPRODUCTCODE AS PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PMISELLABLEPRODUCTCODE AS PRODUCT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PREORDERDATEUNTIL AS PRODUCT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICEQUANTITY AS PRODUCT_PRICE_QUANTITY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTDETAILS_EN AS PRODUCT_PRODUCT_DETAIL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTURL AS PRODUCT_PRODUCT_URL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PUFFS_EN AS PRODUCT_PUFF,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_REDEMPTIONPOINTS AS PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_POINT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_SEODESCRIPTION_EN AS PRODUCT_SEO_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_SEOTITLE_EN AS PRODUCT_SEO_TITLE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_SEOURL_EN AS PRODUCT_SEO_URL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_SHORTDESCRIPTION_EN AS PRODUCT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_STATUSPOINTS AS PRODUCT_STATUS_POINT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_SUBJECTEDTOREGISTRATION AS PRODUCT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TANKSIZE AS PRODUCT_TANK_SIZE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TECHNICALDETAILS_EN AS PRODUCT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TYPE AS PRODUCT_TYPE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_UNIT_CODE AS PRODUCT_UNIT_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_UNIT_DESCRIPTION_EN AS PRODUCT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VEEVTANKSIZE_EN AS PRODUCT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_WARRANTYINFORMATION_EN AS PRODUCT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

__LOAD_TS

ORDER BY __LOAD_TS DESC

) AS row_priority

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

)

SELECT *

FROM RankedProduct

WHERE row_priority = 1

;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, __LOAD_TS

Primary key(s) Target: PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

CKT_MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2


Server validation rule of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2

drop table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2 (

);

alter table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG2 set comment = 'Master data entity describing a product as marketed by the organization, including its key product code, descriptions, attributes, category, flavor, device version, pricing quantity, regulatory flags, and other properties relevant for product identification and management.';
